Project.NAME: AuthClip
Project.keywords: obsidian, web-clipper, browser-extension, asset-discovery, markdown-rewrite, local-first, attachment-writer
Project.annotation: Auth-aware Obsidian Web Clipper fork + companion plugin that saves images/attachments from authenticated pages as local vault files

M-SHARED-TYPES.NAME: shared-types
M-SHARED-TYPES.purpose: Shared TypeScript types, Zod validation schemas, sanitization utilities, and constants for the AuthClip monorepo

type-ClipErrorCode.PURPOSE: Union of all clip error codes (DISCOVERY_FAILED, FETCH_FAILED, etc.)

type-AssetSource.PURPOSE: Asset origin discriminator: img-src, img-srcset, picture-srcset, css-bg

type-DiscoveredAsset.PURPOSE: Single discovered image asset with id, url, source, selected flag

type-AttachmentPayload.PURPOSE: Binary attachment with id, originalUrl, mimeType, suggestedName, dataBase64, optional sha256

type-AttachmentResultStatus.PURPOSE: Attachment outcome: saved | deduplicated | failed | skipped

type-AttachmentStatus.PURPOSE: Discriminated union of per-attachment status variants

type-LinkMapEntry.PURPOSE: Maps original URL to attachment id for markdown rewriting

type-CaptureOptions.PURPOSE: Per-capture settings: rewriteMode, deduplicate, attachmentSubfolder, maxAttachmentBytes

type-CapturePackage.PURPOSE: Canonical manifest for clip + attachments + linkMap + options + optional meta

type-CaptureMeta.PURPOSE: Optional page metadata: author, description, published, siteName, domain, favicon, image, language, wordCount

type-ClipResultStatus.PURPOSE: Overall clip outcome: success | partial | failed

type-ResultReportError.PURPOSE: Error entry with code and message

type-ResultReport.PURPOSE: Plugin-to-extension status report: version, status, notePath, attachments, errors

type-ClipSettings.PURPOSE: Plugin and extension configuration model with defaults

fn-generateSafeName.PURPOSE: Generate unique filename with conflict resolution counter

fn-extractFilenameFromUrl.PURPOSE: Extract filename from URL pathname, handling data:/blob: protocols

fn-buildResultStatus.PURPOSE: Derive ClipResultStatus from attachment statuses and noteSaved flag

fn-validateCapturePackage.PURPOSE: Zod-based runtime validation (schemas re-exported from schemas.ts)

M-TEMPLATE-ENGINE.NAME: template-engine
M-TEMPLATE-ENGINE.purpose: Tokenizer, parser, and renderer for note naming and content templates with 50+ filters, variable resolvers, and schema.org support

fn-tokenize.PURPOSE: Convert template string into token stream

fn-parseTokens.PURPOSE: Parse pre-tokenized token array into AST

fn-render.PURPOSE: Render template string with async context

fn-renderAST.PURPOSE: Render pre-parsed AST with async context

fn-renderTemplate.PURPOSE: Simplified sync-like render: template + variables + currentUrl

fn-applyFilterDirect.PURPOSE: Apply a named filter with params to a value

fn-buildVariables.PURPOSE: Build template variable map from page data

fn-resolveVariable.PURPOSE: Resolve a variable name from context

fn-validateVariables.PURPOSE: Validate variable references in AST, suggest corrections

fn-validateFilters.PURPOSE: Validate filter names and params in AST

fn-createSelectorResolver.PURPOSE: Create async resolver for CSS selector variables

type-Template.PURPOSE: Template definition: id, name, behavior, noteNameFormat, path, noteContentFormat, properties

type-RenderContext.PURPOSE: Render context: variables, currentUrl, tabId, asyncResolver, custom filters

type-Token.PURPOSE: Token with type, value, line, column, trim flags

type-ASTNode.PURPOSE: AST node: text | variable | if | for | set

type-Expression.PURPOSE: Expression node: literal | identifier | binary | unary | filter | group | member

M-CLIPPER-FORK.NAME: clipper-fork
M-CLIPPER-FORK.purpose: Browser extension — asset discovery, authenticated fetch, capture packaging, and transport to Obsidian plugin

fn-discoverAssets.PURPOSE: Find img[src], img[srcset], picture source[srcset] assets in DOM

fn-parseSrcset.PURPOSE: Parse srcset attribute string into URL array

fn-resetIdCounter.PURPOSE: Reset internal asset ID counter for tests

fn-fetchAssets.PURPOSE: Download selected assets concurrently with timeout and size limits

fn-sendCapturePackage.PURPOSE: POST CapturePackage to Obsidian plugin via HTTP

fn-checkHealth.PURPOSE: Check if Obsidian plugin is reachable via /v1/health

type-TransportError.PURPOSE: Error class for transport failures with code and statusCode

type-FetchFailure.PURPOSE: Single fetch failure with assetId, url, code, message

type-PackageInput.PURPOSE: Input for buildCapturePackage: source, markdown, attachments, options

type-TransportOptions.PURPOSE: HTTP transport config: port, authToken, timeoutMs

M-OBSIDIAN-PLUGIN.NAME: obsidian-plugin
M-OBSIDIAN-PLUGIN.purpose: Obsidian desktop plugin — HTTP receiver, manifest validation, attachment writer, markdown rewriter, note creator with frontmatter

fn-startHttpServer.PURPOSE: Start localhost HTTP server with /v1/health and /v1/capture endpoints

fn-validateCapturePackage.PURPOSE: Validate incoming package with Zod schema + version check

fn-executeClipTransaction.PURPOSE: Orchestrate full clip: resolve paths, write attachments, rewrite markdown, create note, build ResultReport

fn-writeAttachment.PURPOSE: Decode base64 and write binary file to vault

fn-rewriteMarkdown.PURPOSE: Replace external image URLs with local wikilinks or relative markdown links

fn-resolveNotePath.PURPOSE: Resolve note path from pathHint and defaultNoteFolder

fn-resolveAttachmentDir.PURPOSE: Compute attachment directory from strategy (same-as-note | subfolder | global)

fn-resolveAttachmentPath.PURPOSE: Compute unique attachment file path with conflict resolution

fn-prependFrontmatter.PURPOSE: Prepend YAML frontmatter with source meta, assets_saved, assets_failed

type-VaultAdapter.PURPOSE: Interface for vault file operations: writeBinary, writeText, readText, exists, ensureDir, listFiles

type-AuthClipPlugin.PURPOSE: Main plugin class: settings, HTTP server lifecycle

type-AuthClipSettingTab.PURPOSE: Obsidian settings UI for all plugin options

type-ValidationResult.PURPOSE: Manifest validation outcome: valid, pkg, errorMessage

type-ClipTransactionInput.PURPOSE: Transaction input: pkg, settings, vault adapter

type-HttpServerResult.PURPOSE: Server handle with port and close function

CrossLink.relation: imports types, schemas, sanitization, result builder
